# Warm & Crumbly — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Warm & Crumbly is a small local bakery based in Brooklyn, NY, specializing in cookies and curated cookie boxes. The name evokes a cozy, homemade warmth with an artisanal feel, suggesting a neighborhood gem with a personal touch and a passion for baked goods.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Sink your teeth into Brooklyn&#39;s most irresistible homemade cookies and curated cookie boxes from Warm &amp; Crumbly. Freshly baked, artisanal treats delivered with a personal touch. Order your box today!

### Gift Boxes
https://example.com/gift-boxes
Surprise someone special with our signature curated cookie boxes, packed with warm, crumbly perfection. Handcrafted in Brooklyn for any occasion. Design your delicious gift now!

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover the story of Warm &amp; Crumbly, a neighborhood gem in Brooklyn, NY, where every batch of homemade cookies is baked with passion and a personal touch. Come taste the love!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to elevate your dessert game? Reach out to Warm &amp; Crumbly in Brooklyn for custom cookie boxes or just to say hello. We can&#39;t wait to bake for you—get in touch!

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Warm & Crumbly
Warm & Crumbly is a small local bakery based in Brooklyn, NY, specializing in cookies and curated cookie boxes. The name evokes a cozy, homemade warmth with an artisanal feel, suggesting a neighborhood gem with a personal touch and a passion for baked goods.

## Target Audience
- Gift-Giving Professionals
- Busy Parents
- Holiday Shoppers
- yang moms

## Industry
Food & Beverage

- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
